commits.summary: refactor: rename internal helpers, no behavior change

evidenceItems.excerpt:
refactor: rename internal helpers, no behavior change

Renamed validateEmail to isValidEmail. Extracted sanitizePassword helper.
All existing tests pass identically and public API surface is unchanged.
evidenceItems.selectionReason: Commit message explicitly states the change is a behavior-preserving refactor.
Diff shows only internal renames and extraction of a no-op helper.
